description_long: This is a small, blue biplane with a classic design, featuring two sets of straight wings stacked vertically and supported by golden struts. The fuselage is streamlined and painted blue, with a single open cockpit located just behind the upper wing. The nose houses a black engine cowling and a golden, three-bladed propeller. The landing gear consists of two main wheels under the wings and a small tailwheel at the rear. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all in matching blue, giving the aircraft a vintage, sporty appearance.
description: A blue, vintage-style biplane with stacked wings, golden struts, an open cockpit, and a three-bladed propeller.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue fuselage, stacked wings, open cockpit, and the main landing gear with a visible tailwheel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black engine cowling, golden propeller, and the symmetrical arrangement of the biplane's wings and struts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blue tail, open cockpit, and the alignment of the landing gear and wings.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the tailwheel beneath the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, parallel wings stacked vertically and supported by interplane struts; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a three-bladed propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a single tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing, mid-fuselage.
